Critical misclustering: varname HLVEF45 ('LV EF LESS OR EQUAL TO 45%, 0-NO; 1-YES') also appears in LV_EF_LOW_FLAG and is clearly not a wall motion summary variable. The only true wall motion variable in this concept is QLWMSUM. HLVEF45 appears to be incorrectly assigned here. Recommend removing HLVEF45 from this concept; the concept should represent only the semi-quantitative wall motion summary from QLWMSUM.

Critical data integrity issue: the raw data for this concept includes two varnames — E03YRSWD (Exam E, correctly described as 'years widowed/divorced/separated') and H03YRINS (Exam H). However, the description associated with H03YRINS in this concept reads 'for how much time during the past two years did you not have coverage? Years' — which matches YEARS_WITHOUT_HEALTH_INSURANCE, not years widowed/divorced/separated. Furthermore, H03YRINS also appears as a varname in YEARS_WITHOUT_HEALTH_INSURANCE (exams D, E, F, G, I, J). The Exam H observation here appears to be a mismapping: H03YRINS likely belongs to YEARS_WITHOUT_HEALTH_INSURANCE, not this concept. Recommend data audit to confirm correct varname for Exam H years widowed/divorced/separated, and remove H03YRINS from this concept if confirmed mismapped.

The varname H03YRINS (Exam H) does not appear in this concept's varname list (D03YRINS, E03YRINS, F03YRINS, G03YRINS, I03YRINS, J03YRINS) despite the expected naming pattern — it appears instead in YEARS_WIDOWED_DIVORCED_SEPARATED with a description matching health insurance, suggesting H03YRINS was mismapped to that concept and belongs here.
